flopermit.us

Analysis Complete

Fort Lauderdale · Roofing Permit

67%
Compliance
📋 Document Checklist
  • ✕
    Notice of Commencement (Recorded) NEEDED
  • ✕
    Product Approval / NOA for Roofing Material NEEDED
  • ✕
    Roof Plan / Layout Drawing NEEDED
  • ✓
    Building Permit Application ✓ Found
  • ✓
    Contractor License ✓ Found
  • ✓
    Workers Comp / Insurance Certificate ✓ Found
  • ✓
    Property Owner Authorization ✓ Found
⚠ Critical Issues
NOC must be recorded with Broward County Clerk before submission — unrecorded NOCs will be rejected
Insurance cert lists wrong certificate holder — must name "City of Fort Lauderdale"
⚡ Fort Lauderdale Warnings
⚠️ Fort Lauderdale NOC threshold is $5,000 — your project likely requires one
⚠️ Circle (don't highlight) relevant info on NOA documents — highlighted NOAs are rejected
🚫

Another rejection

Missing one document. Now you're making another trip to the building department and losing a day.

🤷

Every city is different

Fort Lauderdale wants it one way, Pompano wants it another. Hard to keep up with every city's rules.

💸

Expediters are expensive

Paying $300-500 per permit for someone to check your paperwork adds up fast when you're pulling 10+ a month.

How It Works

Three steps. Thirty seconds.

1

Pick your city

Select from Fort Lauderdale, Pompano Beach, Hollywood, Boca Raton, and more.

2

Upload your docs

Drag in your entire permit package — applications, plans, NOCs, insurance certs, all of it.

3

Get your checklist

See exactly what's missing, what's wrong, and what each city specifically requires.

What It Catches

The stuff that gets you rejected

  • ✓Missing or unrecorded Notice of Commencement
  • ✓Insurance cert with wrong certificate holder name
  • ✓Unsigned or unsealed plans and applications
  • ✓Wrong number of plan sets for that city
  • ✓Missing product approvals or NOAs for HVHZ
  • ✓Submitting paper when the city requires digital
  • ✓Missing energy calculations, load calcs, or surveys
  • ✓Contractor not registered with that specific city

Why Flo Permit

Permit expediter vs Flo Permit

Permit Expediter

  • $300–500 per permit
  • Takes 1–3 days to review
  • Only knows a few cities well
  • Phone tag and back-and-forth
  • Not available at 11pm when you're prepping

Flo Permit

  • Starts free. Plans from $29/mo
  • Results in 30 seconds
  • City-specific rules built in
  • Upload and done
  • Available 24/7 whenever you need it

Upload your docs. See what's missing.
